description: Contract, agreement, SLA, terms, or policy defining a binding arrangement between parties

parties.description: List of involved parties or signatories in the contract

type.description: Type of contract (e.g., service agreement, NDA, license, SLA, employment)

effective_date.description: Date the contract becomes effective (ISO 8601 format)

expiry_date.description: Date the contract expires or renews (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the contract

key_terms.description: Key contractual terms, clauses, or conditions (e.g., payment terms, termination notice)
